explanation: This command uses standard spacing and quotes to invoke iexpress.exe with the required flags and a SED file path. It matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command removes spaces between flags and uses an alternative suspicious path (Windows\Temp) as defined in the Sigma rule. It still triggers the detection.
This command omits quotes around the SED file path since the path does not contain spaces. It still satisfies the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
